requirement_topic.en: ANRE Storage Activity and Moldelectrica Grid-Connection Review

summary.en: Moldova regulates storage and market participation through ANRE and transmission/distribution procedures administered through Moldelectrica and local operators. Whether a project is standalone, behind-the-meter, or paired with generation, grid-connection conditions are project-specific and should be handled through accepted interconnection studies, protection settings, metering scope, dispatch logic, and acceptance testing independent of product-level CE documentation.
summary.zh: 摩尔多瓦通过ANRE及其与Moldelectrica和地方运营商的电网程序管理储能与市场参与。无论BESS是独立项目、用户侧项目还是与发电配套，是否并网主要由项目决定，应通过核准的接入研究、保护设定、计量范围、调度逻辑和验收测试处理，独立于产品层面的CE文件。
summary.zht: 摩爾多瓦透過ANRE及其與Moldelectrica和地方營運商之電網程序管理儲能與市場參與。無論BESS是獨立專案、用戶側專案還是與發電配套，是否併網主要由專案決定，應透過核准的接入研究、保護設定、計量範圍、調度邏輯和驗收測試處理，獨立於產品層面的CE文件。

standards_or_laws: ANRE market regulation and licensing framework
Moldova grid connection practices and transmission interconnection guidance

summary.en: China documents like GB/T 36558-2023 and related grid-company acceptance specifications can support technical comparison, but they do not establish ANRE status decisions, Moldelectrica interconnection approval, or Moldova market-participation entitlement.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 36558-2023及电网企业验收规范等文件可用于技术比较，但不能确定ANRE身份判定、Moldelectrica接入批准或摩尔多瓦市场参与资格。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 36558-2023及電網企業驗收規範等文件可用於技術比較，但不能確定ANRE身份判定、Moldelectrica接入批准或摩爾多瓦市場參與資格。

gap.en: Moldova-bound packages should separate product compliance from project authorization and include grid studies, PCS settings, protection coordination, single-line diagrams, communication and metering interfaces, acceptance records, and Moldova-language operating documents for the project operator and Moldelectrica.
gap.zh: 面向摩尔多瓦的文件应将产品合规与项目授权分开，分别提供电网研究、PCS参数、保护配合、单线图、通信与计量接口、验收记录，以及面向项目运营方和Moldelectrica的摩尔多瓦语文件。
gap.zht: 面向摩爾多瓦的文件應將產品合規與專案授權分開，分別提供電網研究、PCS參數、保護配合、單線圖、通訊與計量介面、驗收紀錄，以及面向專案營運方和Moldelectrica的摩爾多瓦語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for projects requiring ANRE status, market participation, or transmission/distribution connection approval; route depends on site type and connection point
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB/T 36558-2023 is technical preparation only and does not replace ANRE or Moldelectrica approvals

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Moldova ANRE interconnection and Moldelectrica technical reviews as separate from product CE-style compliance. Do not treat Chinese project review documents as Moldova-wide grid-approval documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将摩尔多瓦ANRE并网与Moldelectrica技术审查作为与产品CE合规分离的程序。不得将中国项目审查文件当作摩尔多瓦全局并网批准文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將摩爾多瓦ANRE併網與Moldelectrica技術審查作為與產品CE合規分離的程序。不得將中國專案審查文件視為摩爾多瓦全域併網批准文件。
